items.claim: Luke Riley has poor takedown defense at 37%.
Kai Kamaka III lands a takedown approximately every other round.
items.quote: Kamaka can land like a takedown every other round.

items.claim: Adrien Giannes has a significant reach advantage of 4 inches over Cody Garbrandt.
Adrien Giannes significantly outpaces Cody Garbrandt in striking volume with 6 significant strikes per minute compared to 2.8.
items.quote: Giannis six significant strikes per minute to 2.8 for Garbrandt.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt was outperformed by Xiao Long in their recent fight despite winning by decision.
items.quote: he trailed 59 to 28 in significant strikes, but that's because, I believe, if I remember correctly, Xiao Long got a point taken away

items.claim: Adrien Giannes is more active than Cody Garbrandt.
items.quote: Giannis is just doubling him up in in activity.
